about.title: About Me
about.summary1: I'm a fullstack developer, Information Systems student, and I enjoy building things that actually work. Day to day, I move between the interface and what runs behind it, looking after both ends.
about.summary2: I like owning a problem end to end: interface, API, review, tweak. I prefer clean code and clear decisions over sounding smart and delivering little. I want something another person can maintain, that won't break the next day, and that the team can keep improving together. I say what I think, ask for help when I need it, and I'm always learning something new.

elevate.description: At elevate, I worked on the fullstack development team, contributing to the evolution of digital products with a focus on quality, UI/API consistency, and continuous delivery.

elevateAuthApi.description: Authentication and authorization platform (Java + Spring Boot) with OAuth2/OpenID Connect and JWT token issuance/validation. Multi-tenant solution by domain, client-specific custom login, scope/permission control, and administrative endpoints, with containerized deployment via Docker.

seatHub.description: Complete coworking platform for booking workspaces. Management system with availability control, hourly/daily/monthly bookings, an admin dashboard, and payments integration. Web and mobile apps with interactive maps.

tapInOut.description: Smart digital time tracking system with facial biometrics and real-time GPS. AI-powered dashboard for overtime alerts, time bank management, and labor risk detection. Advanced security with AES-256 encryption and OAuth2.

campoLead.description: SaaS mobile app in development focused on agricultural input sellers: management of producers, products, sales, and visits in a single app, with an experience designed for field use (including offline-first). Built with React Native (Expo) and optimized navigation, integrated with a backend focused on data consistency and efficient sync. The project aims to increase commercial productivity in agribusiness by centralizing information and facilitating real-time negotiation tracking.

footballJerseyShop.description: Full-stack e-commerce focused on football jerseys: catalog with search and filters, cart, order flow, and a purchase journey tuned for conversion. REST API in Java with Spring Boot (business rules, security, and stock consistency), responsive high-performance React UI. Hybrid data layer with PostgreSQL as the system of record and Supabase accelerating auth, media, and complementary features. Mercado Pago checkout with webhooks and payment state handling to close the loop reliably.
footballJerseyShop.inactivityNote: Site may be offline due to Supabase free tier inactivity.

buscaCep.description: Web app for postal code lookup integrated with the ViaCEP API. Intuitive interface to search full addresses by postal code, with validation and error handling.

weatherApp.description: Real-time weather forecast app integrated with a weather API. Displays temperature, conditions, and forecasts with a clean, responsive design.
weatherApp.inactivityNote: Site may be offline due to weather API inactivity.

calculator.description: Modern, functional web calculator with a minimalist design. Performs basic math operations with a responsive UI and smooth user experience.
